free_text: Reaction deep spallation on radioactive nucleus I-129
Two target NaI, weight 0.425 g, isotopic composition:
I-129 85% and I-127 15%, diameter 21 mm, were used.
The measurements were began after 10 min
end of bombardment and continued in during 33 days.
